description_long: This object is a sleek, angular airplane with a faceted, stealth-inspired design, featuring a sharply pointed nose and a low-profile fuselage. The body is predominantly smooth and dark, with minimal surface detailing, suggesting a focus on aerodynamic efficiency and radar evasion. The wings are integrated into the main body in a delta configuration, lacking visible separation or pronounced dihedral angles. The engine intakes are recessed and positioned symmetrically on either side of the nose, with no visible propellers or external engine nacelles. The tail section is sharply tapered, with no distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible, giving the rear a streamlined, faceted appearance. The overall form is compact and monolithic, with a matte black finish that absorbs light and reduces reflections.
description: A compact, angular, matte-black airplane with a stealthy, faceted body and integrated delta wings, lacking visible tail fins or external engines.
description_view_0: Front view shows a sharply pointed nose, recessed engine intakes, and a wide, faceted body with no visible cockpit or tail surfaces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low-profile, wedge-shaped fuselage and the seamless integration of the wing with the body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a tapered, faceted tail section with no distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers, emphasizing the stealthy design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular, monolithic body and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, delta configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles; wings are smoothly blended into the fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet intakes integrated into the forward fuselage, no external nacelles or propellers visible.
attribute_tail_design: No distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers; tail is sharply tapered and faceted, resembling a tailless or blended-body configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible in any view.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Cockpit appears to be forward-mounted and fully enclosed, with a low-profile canopy integrated into the fuselage.
